allow: Bash(rm -f notebooks/notebooks/01_data_exploration.ipynb && uv run jupyter nbconvert --to notebook --execute notebooks/01_data_exploration.ipynb --output 01_data_exploration.ipynb --output-dir notebooks/ --ExecutePreprocessor.timeout=600 2>&1)
